title: Entertains
summary: You perform, mostly for the benefit of others.
tiers: Tier 3: Knowledge Skills or Greater Enhanced Potential
Tier 6: Master Entertainer or Vindictive Performance
gm_intrusions: The audience is annoyed or offended. Musical instruments break. Paints dry in their pots. The words to a poem or song are forgotten.
text: You perform, mostly for the benefit of others.
details: You perform, mostly for the benefit of others.
